exercises.sentence: Siempre ____ la verdad a mis padres.
exercises.translation: I always tell the truth to my parents.

exercises.sentence: Ahora ____ que estoy muy cansado.
exercises.translation: Right now I say that I am very tired.

exercises.sentence: Por favor, ____ lo que piensas.
exercises.translation: Please, I say what you think.

exercises.sentence: Tú siempre ____ mentiras a todos.
exercises.translation: You always tell lies to everyone.

exercises.sentence: Dime, ¿qué ____ sobre esta película?
exercises.translation: Tell me, what do you say about this movie?

exercises.sentence: Sé que ____ eso por broma.
exercises.translation: I know you say that as a joke.

exercises.sentence: Ayer le ____ que no podía ir a la fiesta.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I told him that I could not go to the party.

exercises.sentence: Lo ____ con toda claridad para que entendieran.
exercises.translation: I said it very clearly so they would understand.

exercises.sentence: Le ____ la verdad en ese momento.
exercises.translation: I told him the truth at that moment.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué le ____ a tu hermano hace un momento?
exercises.translation: What did you tell your brother a moment ago?

exercises.sentence: No me ____ nada sobre el examen ayer.
exercises.translation: You did not tell me anything about the exam yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Me ____ que tenías mucha hambre.
exercises.translation: You told me you were very hungry.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo siempre ____ la verdad.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I always told the truth.

exercises.sentence: Cada mañana yo ____ buenos días a mis vecinos.
exercises.translation: Every morning I used to say good morning to my neighbors.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre ____ lo mismo en las reuniones.
exercises.translation: I always said the same thing in the meetings.

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ cosas muy amables cuando estabas feliz.
exercises.translation: You used to say very kind things when you were happy.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú cuando tenías miedo?
exercises.translation: What did you used to say when you were afraid?

exercises.sentence: Antes ____ que no te gustaba el café.
exercises.translation: Before you used to say that you didn't like coffee.

exercises.sentence: Yo le ____ toda la verdad si me preguntara.
exercises.translation: I would tell him the whole truth if he asked me.

exercises.sentence: Yo no ____ nada en esa situación.
exercises.translation: I would not say anything in that situation.

exercises.sentence: Si fuera tú, yo le ____ que sí.
exercises.translation: If I were you, I would tell him yes.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú en mi lugar?
exercises.translation: What would you say in my place?

exercises.sentence: Tú no ____ eso si supieras la respuesta.
exercises.translation: You would not say that if you knew the answer.

exercises.sentence: ¿Me ____ la verdad si pudieras?
exercises.translation: Would you tell me the truth if you could?

exercises.sentence: Mañana te ____ la respuesta final.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will tell you the final answer.

exercises.sentence: Te lo ____ todo cuando nos veamos.
exercises.translation: I will tell you everything when we see each other.

exercises.sentence: Pronto les ____ la buena noticia.
exercises.translation: Soon I will tell them the good news.

exercises.sentence: ¿Me ____ la verdad más tarde?
exercises.translation: Will you tell me the truth later?

exercises.sentence: Sé que ____ lo que piensas al final.
exercises.translation: I know you will say what you think in the end.

exercises.sentence: Me ____ qué tal te fue en el viaje.
exercises.translation: You will tell me how the trip went for you.
